blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,813 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
